name: Bujingi Hare
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>武</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぶ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>神</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>器</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぎ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－サグサ
desc: During either player's turn: You can banish this card from your Graveyard, then target 1 Beast-Warrior-Type "Bujin" monster you control; once during this turn, it cannot be destroyed by battle or by card effects. You can only use the effect of "Bujingi Hare" once per turn.
mnst_eff: During either player's turn: You can banish this card from your Graveyard, then target 1 Beast-Warrior-Type "Bujin" monster you control; once during this turn, it cannot be destroyed by battle or by card effects. You can only use the effect of "Bujingi Hare" once per turn.
eff: During either player's turn: You can banish this card from your Graveyard, then target 1 Beast-Warrior-Type "Bujin" monster you control; once during this turn, it cannot be destroyed by battle or by card effects. You can only use the effect of "Bujingi Hare" once per turn.

mst: Cannot be destroyed by card effects
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
